title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
